name: Angel Hair Pasta with Cilantro, Sun-Dried Tomatoes & Feta
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces "Bella" sun-dried tomatoes in oil, coarsely chopped
2 tablespoons olive oil, from the tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients and set aside.
2. Cook the pasta according to package directions.
3. Toss the cooked pasta with the sun-dried tomatoes, olive oil, cilantro, and feta cheese.
4. Serve warm or cold.
